item.text:
PASS_FAIL
FAIL

FINDINGS
1. No concrete proof artifact is provided (no snippet or line reference from `docs/STATUS.md` confirming milestone tag `A` and the status-source link).
2. Project-goal alignment is not explicit; the note states a documentation change but does not show how it improves success-rate/throughput with quality or advances the `PLAN.md` objective.

REQUIRED_RETRIES
1. Provide file-backed evidence from `docs/STATUS.md` (with line reference) showing milestone tag `A`.
2. Provide file-backed evidence from `docs/STATUS.md` (with line reference) showing progress verification source `docs/SPEC-TRACKING.md`.
3. Add an explicit alignment statement connecting this change to faster/safer progress validation and PLAN objective movement.

UNBLOCK_GUIDANCE
Re-submit with concrete artifacts (file + line references) and one explicit goal-alignment rationale; then re-run strong review.
